channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Jürgen Habermas: A Serious Man
item.description: The late German philosopher and educator elevated liberal secularism to the highest level of academic political philosophy.

item.title: Louisiana Senator Cassidy loses reelection; Trump claims revenge over impeachment vote
item.description: Senator Bill Cassidy, who was on Trump's revenge list for his 2021 impeachment conviction vote, lost his reelection bid.

item.title: The Times Has Been Getting the Israel-Hamas War Wrong from the Start
item.description: The dog-rape story that sparked controversy this past week fits a pattern.

item.title: Harvard and Yale Discover (Gasp!) the Importance of Viewpoint Diversity
item.description: But endowed chairs for conservative scholars won't fix the problem.
